name: Oatmeal Gingerbread (Scottish)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F or Mark 4.
2. Line a 7-inch square baking tin with buttered greaseproof paper.
3. In a saucepan, melt the butter over gentle heat.
4. Add sugar and treacle to the melted fat; stir until combined.
5. Sift flour and baking soda into a bowl.
6. Add oatmeal, sugar, and spices to the dry ingredients.
7. Stir in the melted treacle mixture, beaten egg, and milk.
8. Pour batter into the prepared tin and bake for about 45 minutes.
9. Allow cooling in the tin for approximately 10 minutes before turning out onto a wire rack.
